name: Eureka page renders the connections explorer for a logged-in user
description: A logged-in user opens /app/eureka and sees the real Eureka feature -- the 'Eureka!' heading and the guidance about discovering hidden connections between subjects -- with the connections explorer rendered below (either generated connection content/controls or a clear empty state). This is a new account, so populated connections are NOT required.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the page renders the 'Eureka!' heading (not a 404 or blank screen) with the descriptive guidance about discovering hidden connections between subjects

Verify the connections explorer area below the header renders real content -- either a control to generate/reveal a connection and connection cards, OR a clear empty-state or prompt message -- rather than an empty or broken container
